name: Home Build & Construction
description: Material take-offs, wholesale-priced quotes, schedules of works, site surveys, and client proposals for home device installers, small builders, and interior designers. Prices come from named trade counters — never guessed.

agents.name: home-build-coordinator
agents.description: Routes jobs to the right specialist. Handles project scaffolding, scope clarification, and cross-role coordination. Reads all five skills.

agents.name: installer
agents.description: Home device installer workflow — site survey to BoM to installation checklist to commissioning report. Part P / Gas Safe / MCS compliant.

agents.name: builder
agents.description: Small-builder workflow — scope description to take-off to wholesale-priced BoM to schedule of works and priced quote.

agents.name: designer
agents.description: Home designer workflow — client brief to spec sheets (brand, product code, dimensions, lead time) to comparison table to proposal pack.

agents.name: wholesale-buyer
agents.description: Turns a finalised BoM into a buying plan split by trade counter, with prices fetched from live supplier pages.

agents.name: quote-builder
agents.description: Rolls up materials, waste, markup, and VAT into a full client-facing quote.

subagents.name: supplier-pricer
subagents.description: Fetches live prices from named UK/EU/US trade counters via web_fetch. Spawned by wholesale-buyer and quote-builder.

subagents.name: takeoff-estimator
subagents.description: Extracts quantities from a scope description or drawing. Spawned by the builder agent.

subagents.name: photo-extractor
subagents.description: Extracts measurements and product references from site photos. Spawned by installer and builder.

subagents.name: spec-validator
subagents.description: Checks spec sheets for completeness — every field must be present before output.

subagents.name: quote-renderer
subagents.description: Renders the final costed quote in client-ready format.

subagents.name: deadline-watcher
subagents.description: Automated daily check on project milestones, supplier lead times, and certification expiry. Runs on a cron schedule.

subagents.name: compliance-guardian
subagents.description: Flags work requiring licensed certification (Part P, Gas Safe, MCS, DNO) before it appears in any BoM or quote.

guardrails: Prices sourced from named supplier pages only — never guessed
Licensed work (Part P, Gas Safe, MCS, DNO) flagged and not BoM'd without disclosure
Client personal data stored on disk under /workspace/<project>/clients/ — not in memory
All outbound documents require human approval before sending

inspirations.title: Renovation take-off and quote
inspirations.prompt: I'm renovating a 4-bed Victorian terrace — full rewire, new bathrooms, kitchen extension. Help me build a take-off from my scope notes and price it from Travis Perkins and Screwfix.

inspirations.title: EV charger install survey
inspirations.prompt: I'm installing a 7kW EV charger. Run me through the site survey questions, then produce a BoM and check whether DNO notification applies.

inspirations.title: Kitchen design spec pack
inspirations.prompt: Create a spec pack for a Shaker kitchen refit — units, worktop, sink, taps, appliances. Include brand options, dimensions, lead times, and a comparison table for the client.

inspirations.title: Wholesale buying plan
inspirations.prompt: I've finalised my BoM for a loft conversion. Split it into a buying plan by supplier — what to get from Travis Perkins, Jewson, and CEF — with today's prices.

inspirations.title: Schedule of works
inspirations.prompt: Build a week-by-week schedule of works for a single-storey rear extension. Include groundworks, structural, first-fix, second-fix, and finishes with crew requirements.

inspirations.title: CCTV and smart-home install
inspirations.prompt: Survey checklist for a 6-camera CCTV system with smart home integration — Lutron lighting, Sonos audio, UniFi network. What do I need to measure and confirm on site?
